name: lyra-podman-deploy
description: Deploying containers with Podman on systemd hosts: quadlet units, rootless defaults, health-gated startup (Notify=healthy), auto-update with automatic rollback, digest-pinned releases, pods, networks, SELinux-aware volumes, file-mounted secrets, and resource limits — with worked quadlet stacks and a debug checklist. Integrates with lyra-podman-images, lyra-ci-cd-automation, lyra-security-containers.
